findings.search_query: Hezekiah Ripley 1693 Hingham Massachusetts Sarah Garnet genealogy
findings.source_title: Capt. Hezekiah Ripley (c.1716 - 1778) - Genealogy (Geni)
findings.snippet: Hezekiah Ripley (b. 1693, d. 1736) married Sarah Gardiner (also recorded as Garnet) on 16 February 1716 in Hingham, Plymouth County, MA; their son was Capt. Hezekiah Ripley (c.1716-1778) born in Hingham.
findings.claimed_facts: Hezekiah Ripley b.1693 d.1736 Hingham MA; m. Sarah Garnet/Gardiner 16 Feb 1716 Hingham; sons incl. Capt. Hezekiah Ripley (c.1716), Joshua Ripley (1718), John Ripley (1720).
findings.notes: Dates and Hingham locale match worklist. Spouse surname variably given as Garnet/Gardiner/Gardner across web trees. Geni/web-tree level evidence; couldn't read full FamilySearch/vital record. The marriage 16 Feb 1716 from search snippet, not directly verified in a primary record.

findings.search_query: Joanna Hodgkins 1686 Gloucester Massachusetts Peter Coombs Brunswick Maine
findings.source_title: COOMBS FAMILIES OF NEW ENGLAND
findings.snippet: Peter Coombs's wife can only be documented to have been named Joanna; Coombs family oral tradition suggests Peter 'might' have married a sister of his brother Anthony Coombs' wife Mercy Hodgkins of Gloucester, MA, but no record places Peter in Gloucester. The known Hodgkins family records do not include a daughter named Joanna nor a gap allowing a 17th child. Peter bought land on the New Meadows River (now Brunswick, ME) in the 1730s and d. Jan 1768.
findings.claimed_facts: Peter Coombs's wife was named Joanna; maiden surname Hodgkins is UNPROVEN (oral tradition only). Family moved to New Meadows/Brunswick ME in 1730s. Peter d. Jan 1768.
findings.notes: CONFLICT: worklist gives birth 18 May 1686 Gloucester and death Apr 1768; Geni and FamilySearch (ancestors.familysearch.org/en/LH1P-B82) give b. 4 May 1694, d. 28 Dec 1767. The Hodgkins maiden name itself is disputed (combs-families.org and WikiTree Unknown-577718 treat surname as unknown). Flag for human review.

findings.search_query: John Hodgdon 1708 Newington New Hampshire Mary Decker genealogy
findings.source_title: John Hodgdon - MyHeritage / Hodgdon genealogy (WikiTree HODGDON)
findings.snippet: John Hodgdon Jr. lived from about 1708 in Newington, Rockingham, Colony of New Hampshire to 17 July 1793 in Newington; married Mary Decker; children incl. Mary, Charles, Benjamin (b. 20 May 1750), Jane, Sarah, Joseph, Hannah.
findings.claimed_facts: John Hodgdon b. ~1708 Newington NH, d. 1793 Newington; m. Mary Decker; children incl. Benjamin Hodgdon (1750).
findings.notes: Birthplace, spouse and Newington locale match worklist. CONFLICT on death date: worklist 27 May 1793 vs web 17 July 1793. Web-tree level evidence only; see also Genealogy of descendants of Nicholas Hodsdon-Hodgdon (archive.org genealogyofdesce00hodg) for primary corroboration.

findings.search_query: John Young 1706 Kingston New Hampshire Sarah Burnham Joseph Young genealogy
findings.source_title: John H. Young (1706 - 1758) - Genealogy (Geni)
findings.snippet: John Young b. 11 October 1706 in Kingston, NH, d. 22 August 1758 in Kingston; parents Joseph Young and Elizabeth (Sleeper) Young; wife Sarah (Burnham) Young. Joseph Young b. 18 Dec 1682 Exeter NH, m. Elizabeth Sleeper 24 Dec 1705 Kingston.
findings.claimed_facts: John Young b. 11 Oct 1706 Kingston NH, d. 22 Aug 1758 Kingston; parents Joseph Young & Elizabeth Sleeper; wife Sarah Burnham.
findings.notes: All worklist details (dates, place, spouse, both parents) corroborated by Geni. Geni/web-tree level; not a primary vital record.

findings.search_query: Jonathan Sprague 1686 Hingham Bridgewater Plymouth Massachusetts genealogy
findings.source_title: Jonathan Sprague (1686-1756) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: Jonathan, son of William Sprague & Deborah, was born 27 June 1686 (also given 24 Jul 1686) in Hingham; married Lydia Leavitt 23 May 1712 in Hingham; housewright; had nine children in Bridgewater; d. Bridgewater 10 Apr 1756; estate probated 1756 Bridgewater, Plymouth Co., MA.
findings.claimed_facts: Jonathan Sprague b. 1686 Hingham (parents William Sprague & Deborah), m. Lydia Leavitt 23 May 1712 Hingham, housewright, d. 10 Apr 1756 Bridgewater MA; nine children.
findings.notes: Strong match on birth (1686 Hingham) and death (10 Apr 1756 Bridgewater) per worklist. ADDS data the worklist lacks: parents William Sprague & Deborah, spouse Lydia Leavitt. Minor birth-date variant (27 Jun vs 24 Jul 1686). See also Sprague Families in America (archive.org).

findings.search_query: Joshua Guppy 1711 Margaret Bacon New Hampshire genealogy died 1740
findings.source_title: (no specific source located)
findings.notes: No targeted hit for Joshua Guppy (b.1711 Falmouth, Cornwall; d.1740 NH; m. Margaret Bacon). NH Genealogical Record (scholars.unh.edu) and a Bacon family rootsweb site appeared but did not surface specifics. Recommend manual search of NH Genealogical Record and FamilySearch.

findings.search_query: Margaret Stackpole 1688 South Berwick Maine Jonathan Young genealogy
findings.source_title: History and genealogy of the Stackpole family / WikiTree STACKPOLE
findings.snippet: Margaret (Stackpole) Young was born about 1688 in Berwick, York, Maine (Mass. Bay Colony) and lived until after 1758; a Stackpole by birth with siblings incl. Samuel, Honor, Philip, Catherine, James and John Stackpole.
findings.claimed_facts: Margaret Stackpole b. ~1688 Berwick ME, d. aft 1758; married a Young; Stackpole family of Berwick/Rollingsford NH.
findings.notes: Birth ~1688 Berwick and death aft.1758 match worklist; married surname Young matches spouse Jonathan Young. The specific link to a 'Jonathan' Young was not confirmed in snippet. Web-tree level; see Stackpole family history (1920) PDF for primary text.

findings.search_query: Mary Mercy Holmes 1690 Marshfield Plymouth Massachusetts Joseph Silvester genealogy
findings.source_title: Plymouth County, Mass. Family Research - Marriage Records (GenealogyTrails)
findings.snippet: Joseph Sylvester (b. 23 June 1695) married Mercy Holmes 14 July 1721; Joseph d. 23 April 1723.
findings.claimed_facts: Mercy Holmes m. Joseph Sylvester/Silvester 14 July 1721 (Marshfield/Plymouth Co., MA); Joseph b. 1695 d. 1723.
findings.notes: Marriage to Joseph Silvester matches worklist spouse. CAUTION: multiple women named Mercy Holmes in Plymouth Co. in this era (one was Mercy Ford who m. John Holmes). Worklist b. 10 Jan 1690 Marshfield not directly confirmed in snippet. Flag for review.

findings.search_query: Moses Currier 1713 Amesbury Massachusetts Rhoda Wells Hartland Vermont genealogy
findings.source_title: Currier genealogy / Rhoda Wells 1714-1793 (Currier family records)
findings.snippet: Moses Currier (b. c.1713) married Rhoda Wells 24 October 1734 in Amesbury. Rhoda Wells b. 24 Feb 1714 Amesbury, dau. of John Wells and Dorothy Hoyt; the couple had 9 children; family present in Hartland, Windsor Co., Vermont.
findings.claimed_facts: Moses Currier b. ~1713 Amesbury MA; m. Rhoda Wells 24 Oct 1734 Amesbury; 9 children; family to Hartland VT.
findings.notes: Birth, marriage to Rhoda Wells, Amesbury origin and Hartland VT all match worklist. Marriage 24 Oct 1734 corroborated. See Genealogical history of the Currier family (archive.org genealogicalhist00unse) for primary text.

findings.search_query: Priscilla Gunnison 1679 Kittery Maine Nicholas Weeks genealogy
findings.source_title: Some Marriages in Kittery, 1695-1738 (Maine Genealogy Archives)
findings.snippet: Nicholas Weeks married Priscilla Gunnison 7/8 May 1700 in Kittery. Their children incl. Joseph (b. 25 July 1702, m. Catharine Fernald 25 Aug 1748).
findings.claimed_facts: Priscilla Gunnison m. Nicholas Weeks 7 May 1700 Kittery ME; son Joseph Weeks b. 1702.
findings.notes: Marriage to Nicholas Weeks in Kittery confirmed by Kittery marriage record (1700). Worklist birth 1679 Kittery and death Nov 1718 York not directly confirmed in snippet; the 1700 marriage is consistent with a ~1679 birth. See Old Kittery and Her Families (byrnefamily.net PDF).

findings.search_query: Rachel Doane 1701 Truro Barnstable Massachusetts Joseph Strout Falmouth Maine genealogy
findings.source_title: Rachel (Doane) Strout (1701-bef.1739) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: Rachel Doane b. 22 Sep 1701 (Provincetown/Truro, Barnstable, MA Bay); m. Joseph Strout 27 Mar 1716 in Truro; dau. of Hezekiah Doane and Hannah Snow; d. 1739 in Falmouth, Cumberland Co., Maine. Children: Joseph Jr., Joshua, Phebe (Strout) Sawyer, Sarah (Strout) Webber. Descends from Mayflower passenger Constance Hopkins.
findings.claimed_facts: Rachel Doane b. 22 Sep 1701 Truro MA; m. Joseph Strout 1716; parents Hezekiah Doane & Hannah Snow; d. 1739 Falmouth ME; Mayflower descent (Constance Hopkins).
findings.notes: Birth date, parents (father Hezekiah Doane matches worklist), spouse Joseph Strout and death (1739 Falmouth ME) all match worklist precisely. Find a Grave memorial exists for Joseph Strout (findagrave.com/memorial/47403464). Strong web-tree/secondary evidence.

findings.search_query: Rachel Proctor died 11 June 1748 Boston wife of Richard Proctor Find a Grave
findings.source_title: Rachel Procter (unknown-1748) - Find a Grave Memorial
findings.snippet: Rachel Procter, wife of Mr. Richard Procter, died 11 June 1748 at age 88; buried King's Chapel Burying Ground, Boston, MA.
findings.claimed_facts: Rachel Proctor d. 11 June 1748 age 88, wife of Richard Procter; buried King's Chapel Burying Ground, Boston.
findings.notes: Death date 11 June 1748 and Boston locale match worklist exactly; gravestone-based memorial gives age 88 (implies b. ~1660, matching worklist birth 1660). Spouse Richard Proctor confirmed. Find a Grave snippet only (page may block full fetch).

findings.search_query: Rebecca Blaney 1681 Charlestown Massachusetts Thomas Phillips Duxbury genealogy
findings.source_title: Rebecca Blaney (1680-1761) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: Rebecca Blaney b. 13 Feb 1680, bapt. 20 Feb 1681/2, Charlestown, MA; parents John Blaney and Sarah (Sallee) Blaney; m. Thomas Phillips 1 Dec 1702 in Boston by Rev. Cotton Mather; d. 4 March 1761 in Duxbury, MA at age 80.
findings.claimed_facts: Rebecca Blaney b. 13 Feb 1681 Charlestown MA; parents John Blaney & Sarah Powell/Sallee; m. Thomas Phillips 1 Dec 1702 Boston; d. 4 Mar 1761 Duxbury MA.
findings.notes: Birth, parents (John Blaney matches worklist), spouse Thomas Phillips, and death 4 Mar 1761 Duxbury all match worklist. Note worklist mother 'Sarah Powell' vs WikiTree 'Sarah Sallee' - possible surname conflict to review. Marriage performed by Cotton Mather is a notable corroborating detail.

findings.search_query: Rebecca Garfield 1640 Watertown Massachusetts Isaac Mixer Edward Garfield genealogy
findings.source_title: Rebecca Garfield Mixer (1640-1682) - Find a Grave / Geni
findings.snippet: Rebecca Garfield, dau. of Edward Garfield and Rebecca Johnson, b. 10 March 1640/41 Watertown, d. 16 March 1682/3 Watertown; m. 10 January 1661 Watertown to Isaac Mixer (son of Isaac Mixer & Sarah Thurston) as his 2nd of 3 wives. Edward Garfield was a Watertown immigrant (freeman 1635).
findings.claimed_facts: Rebecca Garfield b. 10 Mar 1640 Watertown MA; parents Edward Garfield & Rebecca Johnson; m. Isaac Mixer Jr. 10 Jan 1661 Watertown; d. 16 Mar 1682/3 Watertown.
findings.notes: Birth, parents (both match worklist), spouse Isaac Mixer Jr, and death (16 Mar, year 1682/3 vs worklist 1684) all closely match. Minor death-year variant. Descends from immigrant Edward Garfield (ancestor of Pres. James A. Garfield). See archive.org 'Edward Garfield (1575-1672) of Watertown'.

findings.search_query: Moses Currier 1713 Amesbury Massachusetts Rhoda Wells Hartland Vermont genealogy
findings.source_title: Rhoda Wells 1714-1793 (Currier family records)
findings.snippet: Rhoda Wells b. 24 February 1714 in Amesbury, Essex, MA, to John Wells and Dorothy (Maria) Hoyt; m. Moses Currier (24 Oct 1734 Amesbury); 9 children; d. 13 November 1793 in Hartland, Windsor Co., Vermont.
findings.claimed_facts: Rhoda Wells b. 24 Feb 1714 (worklist 1713) Amesbury MA; parents John Wells & Dorothy Hoyt; m. Moses Currier 24 Oct 1734; d. 13 Nov 1793 Hartland VT.
findings.notes: Birth place/date (24 Feb, year 1713 worklist vs 1714 web), spouse Moses Currier, death 13 Nov 1793 Hartland VT, and father John Wells all match worklist. ADDS mother Dorothy Hoyt. Minor birth-year variant 1713 vs 1714.

findings.search_query: Richard Proctor 1652 Boston Massachusetts wife Rachel died 1719 genealogy
findings.source_title: Richard Procter (1652-1719) - Find a Grave Memorial
findings.snippet: Richard Procter b. 1652 Boston, Suffolk Co., MA; d. 28 January 1719 (aged 66-67) Boston; buried King's Chapel Burying Ground. Wife Rachel Proctor; children Elizabeth, Hannah, John, Rachel, Obediah.
findings.claimed_facts: Richard Proctor b. 1652 Boston; d. 28 Jan 1719 Boston; buried King's Chapel; wife Rachel; children incl. John, Rachel.
findings.notes: Birth 1652 Boston, death 28 Jan 1719, and wife Rachel all match worklist exactly. Gravestone-based Find a Grave memorial at King's Chapel Burying Ground. Worklist death_place says Middlesex Co. but Boston is Suffolk Co. (worklist error). Spouse Rachel = @I322625935781@ (same family group).

findings.search_query: Sarah Decker 1709 Kittery Maine Clement Meserve Gorham genealogy
findings.source_title: Sarah Meserve (Decker) (1709 - 1752) - Genealogy (Geni)
findings.snippet: Sarah Decker b. 10 May 1709 Kittery, York, ME; bapt. Newington NH 30 Sep 1716; m. Clement Meservey 13 Oct 1726 Newington NH; moved to Scarborough, Cumberland Co., ME; children incl. John, Elizabeth (b.1730), Clement IV, Hannah, Joseph, Margaret, Benjamin; d. 14 October 1752 Gorham, Cumberland Co., ME.
findings.claimed_facts: Sarah Decker b. 10 May 1709 Kittery ME; m. Clement Meserve(y) 13 Oct 1726 Newington NH; d. 14 Oct 1752 Gorham ME.
findings.notes: Birth (10 May 1709 Kittery), spouse Clement Meserve, and death (14 Oct 1752 Gorham ME) all match worklist exactly. ADDS marriage date 13 Oct 1726 Newington NH and baptism. Geni/web-tree level evidence.

findings.search_query: Sarah Garnet 1691 Hingham Massachusetts Hezekiah Ripley genealogy Stephen Gardner
findings.source_title: Capt. Hezekiah Ripley (Geni) - via spouse record
findings.snippet: Sarah Garnet (also Gardiner/Gardner) married Hezekiah Ripley 16 February 1716 in Hingham, Plymouth Co., MA; mother of Capt. Hezekiah Ripley (c.1716), Joshua Ripley (1718) and John Ripley (1720).
findings.claimed_facts: Sarah Garnet m. Hezekiah Ripley 16 Feb 1716 Hingham MA; mother of Capt. Hezekiah, Joshua and John Ripley.
findings.notes: Marriage to Hezekiah Ripley in Hingham corroborated via the Ripley records, consistent with worklist (spouse Hezekiah Ripley). A direct record for Sarah Garnet b. 31 Jul 1691 Hingham was NOT located (a different Sarah Garnet b. 1730 Hingham surfaced). Surname variably Garnet/Gardner/Gardiner. Worklist parents Stephen Garnet/Gardner & Sarah Warren unverified. Flag for review.

findings.search_query: Sarah Harmon 1713 Wells Maine John Colbath Samuel Harmon Scarborough genealogy
findings.source_title: The Harmon Genealogy, comprising all branches in New England / Harmons of the Scarborough Branch
findings.snippet: Sarah Harmon b. 1713, dau. of Samuel Harmon (b. 15 June 1686 Wells ME, m. Mercy Simpson 19 Mar 1707 Wells); Sarah m. John Colbrough/Coolbroth 17 August 1732. Samuel Harmon settled at Scottaway Hill, Scarborough ME (1728), built Harmon's Mill.
findings.claimed_facts: Sarah Harmon b. 1713; parents Samuel Harmon & Mercy Simpson/Stimpson; m. John Colbath/Colbroth 17 Aug 1732; Harmon family of Wells/Scarborough ME.
findings.notes: Birth 1713, both parents (Samuel Harmon & Mercy Simpson = worklist Mercy Stimpson), and spouse John Colbath all match worklist. Marriage 17 Aug 1732 (name spelled Colbrough/Coolbroth/Godbroth in records). Sourced to the published Harmon Genealogy.

findings.search_query: Thomas Bragg 1685 Rehoboth Massachusetts Mary Fiske Attleboro John Bragg genealogy
findings.source_title: Mary (Fiske) Bragg (1684-1725) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: Thomas Bragg b. 10 August 1685 Rehoboth, son of John Bragg and Elizabeth Millard; m. Mary Fiske 4 August 1710 in Rehoboth (intentions 13 Apr 1708). Mary Fiske b. 19 Apr 1684 Swansea, d. 1 Jan 1724/5 Attleboro. Thomas of Attleboro was executor of his brother Richard Bragg (probate 16 Sep 1714). Thomas d. 2 March 1750-1759.
findings.claimed_facts: Thomas Bragg b. 10 Aug 1685 Rehoboth MA; parents John Bragg & Elizabeth Millard; m. Mary Fiske 4 Aug 1710 Rehoboth; lived Attleboro; d. early 1750s.
findings.notes: Birth 10 Aug 1685 Rehoboth, father John Bragg, spouse Mary Fiske, and Attleboro residence all match worklist. ADDS mother Elizabeth Millard and marriage date 4 Aug 1710. Worklist death 2 Mar 1754 falls within the WikiTree range (1750-1759). Strong corroboration.
